narrative:
Fulton Twp township has 2,195 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a clear Republican lean of 11.1 percentage points.
